name: autoleilao-mfe
description: Plataforma de leilão de veículos com arquitetura Microfrontend (Module Federation)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix shell && npm install --prefix mfe-cadastro && npm install --prefix mfe-leilao
scripts.build:remotes: npm run build --prefix mfe-cadastro && npm run build --prefix mfe-leilao
scripts.start: concurrently -n "MFE-Cadastro,MFE-Leilao,Shell" -c "blue,yellow,green" "npm run preview --prefix mfe-cadastro" "npm run preview --prefix mfe-leilao" "npm run dev --prefix shell"
